title: TNSRLM Sivaganga – Community Bank Coordinator – 86 Posts
org: Community Bank Coordinator (Samudaya Vangi Orunginaipalar) – Temporary
applyMode: Offline only - in person or by Registered Post to DMMU, Sivaganga
shortInfo: TNSRLM Sivaganga Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 86 vacancies across Sivaganga. Candidates with 12TH Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 26-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through TNSRLM Sivaganga website, Sivaganga.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Sivaganga Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 86 Posts
basic_details.short_information: TNSRLM Sivaganga Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 86 vacancies across Sivaganga. Candidates with 12TH Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 26-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through TNSRLM Sivaganga website, Sivaganga.nic.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Block Mission Management Units (BMMUs) under TNSRLM, Sivaganga District
basic_details.post_name: Community Bank Coordinator (Samudaya Vangi Orunginaipalar) – Temporary
basic_details.application_mode: Offline only - in person or by Registered Post to DMMU, Sivaganga

qualification.education_qualification: Must have passed 12th Standard (Class XII). Must be able to read, write and communicate well in both Tamil and English, and must have numerical/accounting skills. In hilly/tribal areas, if 12th pass candidates are not available, candidates with 10th Standard pass with other required qualifications may be considered with special permission from the District Collector.

selection_process: Written Test (75 marks) + Interview (25 marks) = Total Weightage 100 marks (by District Selection Committee)
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply offline only. No online application mode is available. Applications must be submitted either in person or by Registered Post only. Applications sent by ordinary post or courier will not be accepted. Applications must be submitted on Government working days between 10:00 AM and 5:00 PM from 23.05.2026 to 29.05.2026.
seo_tags: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihood Mission Sivaganga Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026
